generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values duty and order, you know how important it is to maintain strong alliances. The recent debate about reducing our commitment to NATO is concerning. Remember, our allies rely on us just as we rely on them. Cutting back now would send the wrong signal to both friends and adversaries. We've seen what happens when nations act unilaterally - chaos follows. Let's not repeat past mistakes. #StrongerTogether #AllianceCommitment
